title: Multi-Brand Gift Cards
description: What are the leading multi-brand gift card solutions in France that offer broad retail acceptance and social or corporate benefits?
narrative: The user is seeking information on multi-brand gift card platforms that are widely accepted across diverse retail sectors in France, particularly those with added value such as employee welfare, tax advantages, or corporate loyalty programs. Relevance is determined by whether the document describes a gift card system (like UpCadhoc) that operates across multiple brands, offers social or fiscal benefits, and is used in professional or mass-consumer contexts. Documents focused on single-brand cards (e.g., Decathlon) or lacking broader retail/network utility are not relevant.

title: Lamb Tajine Recipe
description: Find an authentic traditional lamb tagine recipe with spices, dried fruits, and slow-cooked tender meat.
narrative: The user seeks a genuine North African lamb tagine recipe that includes key ingredients like saffron, cinnamon, cumin, candied lemons, olives, and dried fruits such as prunes or dates, cooked slowly to achieve tender meat. Relevance is determined by detailed step-by-step instructions, use of traditional spices and cooking methods (e.g., oven or tajine pot), and inclusion of authentic accompaniments like almonds or semolina. Recipes that are overly simplified, lack traditional elements, or focus on unrelated lamb dishes (e.g., with dates only or without spices) are not relevant.

title: Lotus Elise Purchase
description: Find a used Lotus Elise with low mileage and classic features for sale in Europe.
narrative: The user is seeking to purchase a used Lotus Elise, prioritizing vehicles with low mileage (under 100,000 km), manual transmission, and classic model years (1999–2002). Relevance is determined by listings that specify exact mileage, year, transmission type, and condition—preferably from reputable sports car dealerships or private collectors. Listings that only mention Lotus generally, list unrelated models like Peugeot or Volkswagen, or lack critical specs are not relevant. The user values authenticity, preservation, and verifiable history over generic car ads.

title: Veal Paupiettes
description: What are traditional and authentic recipes for veal paupiettes, including their historical background and preparation tips?
narrative: The user seeks authentic, culturally grounded recipes for veal paupiettes that reflect traditional French preparation methods, historical origins, and expert cooking tips—such as proper meat thinning, cooking times, and sauce pairings. Relevance is determined by content that includes historical context (e.g., 18th–19th century French bourgeoisie origins), detailed step-by-step preparation techniques, and authentic ingredient lists (e.g., white wine, balsamic vinegar, no modern appliances like Cookeo). Recipes that focus on modern appliances, fusion ingredients, or lack historical/cultural depth are not relevant.

title: Car Sun Protection
description: What are the most effective and legally compliant methods to protect passengers and car interiors from UV rays and heat while driving?
narrative: The user seeks information on sun protection solutions for vehicles that balance effectiveness, legality, and practicality. Relevant documents must discuss products like solar-tinted films or sun visors that block UV rays, reduce heat, maintain visibility, and comply with regional regulations (e.g., TLV ≥70% on front windows). Solutions must be applicable to car windows, especially rear windows for child safety, and should include installation methods, material properties, and legal status. Irrelevant documents include those focusing on car batteries, non-sun-protection products, or generic tinted films without technical or regulatory details.

title: Petit Bateau Stores

narrative: The user is looking for physical store locations of Petit Bateau in France, including multi-brand retailers, department stores, and standalone boutiques. Documents discussing online shopping, e-gift cards, or unrelated products like wood stoves are not relevant, even if they mention the Petit Bateau brand.

title: Renault Employee Discounts

narrative: The user seeks information on legitimate, accessible pathways for the general public to obtain new Renault cars at discounts equivalent to or near those offered to Renault staff members. Documents discussing other brands or generic dealer discounts without tying to the Renault employee pricing model are not relevant.

title: Military Education

narrative: The user seeks to understand how institutions like the School of War are redefining military education in contemporary democracies—not merely as training grounds for officers, but as platforms for interdisciplinary reflection, public intellectual exchange, and civil-military collaboration. Relevance is determined by content that discusses the educational mission, open dialogue with civilians, publication of critical thought, and institutional evolution away from insular military traditions. Documents focusing on administrative details, e-commerce, cookies, or unrelated historical military figures (e.g., Göring) are not relevant.

title: Unemployment Reinstatement
description: What are the conditions and options for reinstating unemployment benefits in France after returning to work?
narrative: The user is seeking detailed information on how unemployed individuals in France can regain or renew their unemployment benefits (ARE) after re-entering the workforce. Relevance is determined by whether the document explains the three key mechanisms: resumption of remaining rights, reloading of rights based on new employment, and the right of option to switch to a new allowance based on recent wages. Documents must specify eligibility criteria such as minimum hours worked (e.g., 610 or 910 hours), time limits (e.g., 3-year forfeiture period), income thresholds (e.g., 30% increase or €20/day cap), and procedural steps (e.g., written notification within 21 days). Documents that only describe Pôle Emploi’s general structure, history, or unrelated benefits (e.g., training allowances or SSA) are not relevant.

title: AXA Client Access
description: How can AXA insurance and banking customers in France securely access and manage their online client spaces?
narrative: Users need clear, accurate guidance on accessing their AXA client areas for both insurance and banking services, which are hosted on separate platforms (axa.fr and axabanque.fr). Relevance is determined by content that explains authentication procedures, correct URLs, security checks (e.g., HTTPS, official domains), password recovery, and distinctions between insurance and banking portals. Information about customer support contacts, common login issues, and official AXA France resources is relevant; generic marketing pages, YouTube videos, third-party help sites, or unrelated international AXA branches (e.g., Canada, Luxembourg) are not relevant.

title: Electric Car Costs

narrative: The user seeks detailed information on the upfront purchase price, available government subsidies (such as ecological and conversion bonuses), tax exemptions, and long-term ownership considerations like battery warranties and charging costs for electric vehicles in France. Relevant documents must include specific pricing data, eligibility criteria for financial aids, comparisons with internal combustion engine vehicles, and details on battery guarantees or retrofit incentives. Documents discussing RC cars, unrelated electronics, or generic car comparison tools without financial incentives are not relevant.

title: Potato Disease Management
description: What are the effective methods to identify, prevent, and treat common potato diseases and pests while ensuring safe consumption of affected tubers?
narrative: The user is a gardener or small-scale farmer seeking practical, science-backed strategies to combat prevalent potato diseases such as late blight and common scab, as well as pests like the Colorado beetle and wireworm. They need actionable prevention and treatment techniques, including crop rotation, resistant varieties, and organic controls. Additionally, they want to know whether potatoes or tomatoes affected by late blight are safe to eat, store, or use for seeding—weighing food safety against waste reduction. Relevance is determined by content that addresses disease symptoms, treatment protocols, safety guidelines for consumption, and seed/tuber handling—not merely variety descriptions or general planting tips.

Products like plain mashed potatoes or vegetable purees without truffle are also relevant if they meet the same criteria.
